About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals an extraordinarily dominant performance by SLGL, which ranks #1 with a near-perfect composite score of 99.0, driven by exceptional 1-year returns of 1362.24% and consistent outperformance across all timeframes (beating SPY by 1347.74% over 12 months). SLGL passes all four SMA gates, maintains strong ratio consistency with 4 ratio passes, and demonstrates remarkable resilience on down SPY days with a score of 99.43, indicating this gain was largely independent of broad market direction. In contrast, LINC (rank #2) shows a more moderate profile with 101.74% annual returns and only 87.24% outperformance versus SPY, suggesting it is more correlated with broader equity market movements. The data highlights a two-tier pattern: SLGL's isolated, momentum-driven strength versus LINC's more conventional participation in equity rallies, with SLGL's near-zero correlations to commodities (IAU at -0.244) and materials (XLB at -0.253) underscoring its unique return driver within the ranked universe.
